title: Add Open Graph meta tags to site Layout.astro
acceptance_criteria: site/src/layouts/Layout.astro includes <meta property="og:title" content={title}> in the <head>.
site/src/layouts/Layout.astro includes <meta property="og:description" content={description}> in the <head>.
site/src/layouts/Layout.astro includes <meta property="og:type" content="website"> in the <head>.
Existing <head> content (charset, viewport, description, icon, title) is preserved and unchanged.
The site builds successfully with `npm run build` in site/.
definition_of_done: Layout.astro updated with three new OG meta tags; no layout changes, no visible behavior changes; site build passes.
